sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_poisson (id UInt64, occurrences UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_poisson (id, occurrences) VALUES (1, randPoisson(5)), (2, randPoisson(10));
UPDATE test_poisson SET occurrences = randPoisson(8) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, occurrences FROM test_poisson WHERE occurrences > randPoisson(4);
SELECT AVG(occurrences) FROM test_poisson WHERE occurrences < randPoisson(6);
